name: radia-mcp
summary: MCP servers for the Radia CAE ecosystem. 0.24.0 adds parallel races: cubit_mesh_race (N recipes batch-parallel, first hex-success wins, replay live GUI) + build123d_try_race (parameter-sweep N variants in subprocess pool, valid+largest-volume winner) + freecad_exec_safely (Cubit-style checkpoint→batch→commit safety pattern for FreeCAD). 0.23.x base: YouTube + training pack + GitHub .jou search.
author: Kengo Sugahara
